summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 NEW major features in Iteration 9: 1) Mandatory verification proof (photos + 20-char comment), 2) Government officials with blacklist for security services, 3) Kyrgyzstan (PVT) legal jurisdiction, 4) People's Councils system. All 35 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/legal/info returns Kyrgyzstan jurisdiction (ОсОО, Бишкек, ПВТ)
BACKEND: GET /api/gov/categories returns 15 allowed government categories
BACKEND: POST /api/gov/officials creates official with valid category
BACKEND: POST /api/gov/officials rejects FSB keyword with 403
BACKEND: POST /api/gov/officials rejects military keyword with 403
BACKEND: POST /api/gov/officials rejects GRU keyword with 403
BACKEND: POST /api/gov/reviews rejects banned content with 403
BACKEND: POST /api/councils creates council (creator becomes chairman)
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/join adds user as member
BACKEND: POST /api/verifications fails with comment < 20 chars (422)
BACKEND: POST /api/verifications succeeds with photo + 20-char comment
FRONTEND: /terms page shows Кыргызская Республика, ОсОО, ПВТ, Бишкек, no personal names
FRONTEND: /privacy page shows Кыргызская Республика, ОсОО, ПВТ, no personal names
FRONTEND: /gov route exists and shows gov officials page
FRONTEND: /gov page has security notice about banned categories (FSB/FSO/SVR/GRU/military)
FRONTEND: /gov page has add official button and modal with all fields
FRONTEND: /gov page has search input and category filters
FRONTEND: /councils route exists and shows councils page
FRONTEND: /councils page has create council button and modal
FRONTEND: Review verification form has mandatory photo upload (data-testid='verify-photo-upload')
FRONTEND: Review verification form has 20-char minimum comment requirement
FRONTEND: Review verification form shows character counter (X/20 символов)
FRONTEND: Verify button is disabled until photo + 20-char comment provided
critical_code_review_comments: BANNED_GOV_KEYWORDS properly implemented: фсб, фсо, свр, гру, разведк, контрразвед, спецслужб, спецназ, секретн, минобороны, генштаб, военн, росгвардия, нацгвардия
VerificationCreate model correctly requires photos (min_length=1) and comment (min_length=20)
Chairman cannot leave council (must transfer role first)
Only chairman/moderator can create votes in councils
Legal info correctly shows Kyrgyzstan jurisdiction with ОсОО, ПВТ, Бишкек
seed_data_creation: Created test users and sessions for authentication testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested 4 major new features: 1) Verification now requires mandatory photo + 20-char comment (VerificationCreate model), 2) Gov officials system with blacklist for security services (BANNED_GOV_KEYWORDS), 3) Legal documents updated to Kyrgyzstan (ОсОО, ПВТ, Бишкек), 4) People's Councils with 5-level hierarchy (yard→country), discussions, voting, membership. All features working correctly. Test session: test_session_ui_iter9_token.
